info.english_meaning: to learn to read to study to recite

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'yaM (japyaM) saptarAtraM prapaWan pumAn paSyati KecarAn' (BA॰pu॰4.8.53) prapaWan=uccEruccArayan yena yatnena manvAdyErAtmavacanaM prapAWitam (=proktam aDyApitam) prapAWaka iti tEttirIyasaMhitAdizu granTEkadeSasya saYjYA
'vedANgAni ca sarvARi kfzRapakzezu sampaWet' (manu॰4.98) sampaWet=paWet nArTaH samA
'yajYakarmaRIti kim sampAWe mA BUt' (pA0 1234 sUtravfttO) sampAWaH svADyAyakAla iti nyAsaH
'kartari karmavyatihAre' (1315) ityatra pratizeDe hasAdInAmiti vArttikodAharaRe vyatipaWantIti vfttO sTitam tatra parasparaM paWantItyarTaH
'sarpasatramiti KyAtaM purARe paripaWyate' (BA0 Adi0 516) paripaWyate satrezu maDye paWyate'nukramyate
'asya lokasya sarvasya yaH praBuH paripaWyate' (BA0 vana0 14192) paripaWyate sarvatra kIrtyate
'na DarmaH paripAWena Sakyo BArata veditum' (BA0 SAM0 2603) paripAWa AmnAyaH
